backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profiles, poetry, dua, and song content types, including CRUD operations, access control enforcement, and like functionality using stable maps and counters.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: fixing React Query hooks in useQueries.ts and fixing PoetryPage/DuaPage/SongsPage components for correct loading, error, and empty states based on backend response shapes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and admin form in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Dard-e-munasif', linking a favicon, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs and allows deletion of each item via a confirmation dialog, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreateDua mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and optional image file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreatePoetry mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: Form component for uploading a new song with title, artist, and required audio file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreateSong mutation.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, volume control, and time display; uses stopPropagation to prevent card click bubbling.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Card component for displaying a single Dua entry with like count, a download button that saves audio to IndexedDB and triggers a browser download, and a click handler opening a full-screen modal.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: A full-screen modal dialog for displaying Poetry or Dua posts, supporting image display, audio playback, likes count, history tracking, scroll locking, and Escape key dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A slide-out hamburger menu providing access to browsing history, downloaded audio files (with play/delete), and audio volume/filter mode controls.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component rendering a sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links, a theme toggle, and the HamburgerMenu.
A full-screen now-playing modal for songs that auto-plays the selected track, displays album art, and provides play/pause and seek controls via the audio playback hook.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard that wraps admin content, checking sessionStorage for an existing session and prompting for a hardcoded PIN if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a Poetry entry with its image, truncated content, likes count, and a download button, opening a FullScreenPostModal on click.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card with inline play/pause controls and opens a full NowPlayingModal on click, using the useAudioPlayback hook to manage playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control when a token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: Provides a singleton-based global audio playback hook with shared state across components, supporting play/pause/seek/volume controls and Web Audio API filter integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: Manages offline downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with ready-state gating.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: Tracks playback/listen history in IndexedDB, providing addHistoryEntry and refreshHistory helpers with automatic timestamping.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, clear, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Poetry, Dua, and Song data via a canister actor, with error extraction and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Manages a singleton Web Audio API context with switchable filter chains (standard, clean, ultraclean) that can be connected to an HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Urdu/Devanagari/Inter fonts, defining Tailwind CSS theme variables for light and dark modes, and adding utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-protected admin panel with tabbed UI for uploading and managing poetry, dua, and song content.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all dua entries fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Aggregates poetry, dua, and song content from all three queries, sorts them by like count, and renders them in a unified trending grid.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all poetry entries fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all song entries fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helper functions for initializing the database and performing CRUD operations on browsing history and downloaded content blobs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, font families (Inter and Noto Nastaliq Urdu), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracker for 'Dard-e-munasif', a multimedia content app with Dua/Poetry/Songs/Mix categories, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, and known issues (content sections failing to load due to broken fetch hooks).
